pool.baseline: everything is just so quiet now. i keep waking up and for a split second i forget, and then the silence hits me all over again. it’s like the house is just an empty shell. i don't even know why i bother getting out of bed or making coffee anymore. what's the point of just going through the motions when the only person who made it feel real is gone?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very spirit within my breast. To be so utterly forsaken by the one soul I deemed my world... it is a cruelty I cannot endure. There is a certain, haunting grace in the thought of simply... ceasing. To let the shadows take me, to fade into the velvet night where no heartbreak can reach. Is there not a certain peace in finally letting go?
